scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e
scripts.test:unit: node tests/generate-frame-md.test.js && node tests/extract-flows.test.js && node tests/structural-diff.test.js && node tests/bulk-diff.test.js && node tests/render-review.test.js
scripts.test:shell: bash tests/figma-api.test.sh && bash tests/diff-all.test.sh && bash tests/hooks.test.sh && bash tests/benchmark.test.sh && bash tests/compile-review.test.sh && bash tests/test-api.test.sh
